name: bootstrap eval: report top-level includes summary {scenarios_run, scenarios_passed, scenarios_failed, rules_with_fixtures, rules_without_fixtures}
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --emit-report "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/report.json" && for k in scenarios_run scenarios_passed scenarios_failed; do grep -E "$k" .claude-tdd-pro/report.json >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL missing $k" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
